title: Divestitures: Why might management choose to...
summary: Identify reasons management might divest a business unit including focus on core operations.
prompt: Why might management choose to divest a business unit?

options.text: Measures ability to meet short-term obligations
Management might decide to divest a business unit to enhance focus on core

solution: Management might decide to divest a business unit to enhance focus on core operations, improve overall performance, or respond to financial pressures, thereby aiming to maximize stockholder wealth.
